reviews.review_description: Finally a stable way to get Kodi working on quest 3! Dream come true. This works perfectly, use your favourite addons, watch in 3d (from 3d sources of course). 2d window so can pop up on corner in 3d apps. POV and torbox takes you far and is snappier than on my Xbox by quite a bit. So far zero crashes unlike just sidelong Kodi apk. Many thanks - you should be charging for this.
